_about: v1 HEURISTIC daily-guidance rules — subject to astrologer review. Basis: Tarabala (the 9-fold auspiciousness cycle counted from the natal/janma nakshatra to the day's Moon nakshatra) sets base energy; the weekday (hora) lord and paksha modulate it per life-area; lucky colour/number/direction come from the day lord (dik + Vedic numerology). Every number below is tunable IN THIS TABLE without a code change. weekday indices are Python weekday(): Monday=0 ... Sunday=6.

1.opportunity: A day to tend to yourself — {area} rewards quiet, deliberate effort.
1.warning: Guard your reserves; {area} can drain you if you overextend.

2.opportunity: Fortune favours you — {area} is primed for a bold, well-timed move.
2.warning: Don't let a lucky run make you careless with {area}.

3.opportunity: Small, careful steps still move {area} forward today.
3.warning: A friction day — postpone big {area} decisions and sidestep disputes.

4.opportunity: Stability is on your side — nurture {area} and it flourishes.
4.warning: Comfort can turn to complacency; keep {area} from stalling.

5.opportunity: Clearing what's stuck now frees {area} for what's next.
5.warning: Expect headwinds in {area}; patience beats force today.

6.opportunity: You can finish what matters — {area} responds to focused effort.
6.warning: Don't spread yourself thin; one strong {area} push beats many.

7.opportunity: Even a hard day can protect {area} if you slow right down.
7.warning: A vulnerable day — shield {area} and skip unnecessary risk.

8.opportunity: Allies lift you — lean into {area} with people you trust.
8.warning: Don't isolate; {area} needs connection more than control today.

9.opportunity: One of your strongest days — {area} is wide open for a leap.
9.warning: Rare tailwinds fade; don't waste today's momentum on {area}.
